subcodes.first_line: O thou who longest to attain His presence! Jinab-i-Furughi is here, and with eloquent tongue and fluent speech expresseth his ardent devotion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دیدار حضرت فروغی حاضر و با لسانی فصیح و به نطقی بلیغ شرح اشتیاق
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
